lessons.name: Unit 4: Ethnic Groups of Viet Nam
lessons.chapter: Unit 4: Ethnic Groups of Viet Nam
lessons.description: Learn about ethnic groups with Yes/No and Wh-questions.

theory.title: Unit 4: Ethnic Groups of Viet Nam

sections.heading: 1. Từ vựng (Vocabulary)
sections.content:
WordType & IPAMeaningExample
Ethnic group(n) /ˈeθnɪk ɡruːp/Dân tộcVietnam has 54 ethnic groups.
Minority(n) /maɪˈnɒrəti/Thiểu sốThey are a minority group.
Costume(n) /ˈkɒstjuːm/Trang phụcTraditional costumes are beautiful.
Stilt house(n) /stɪlt haʊs/Nhà sànThey live in stilt houses.
Terraced field(n) /ˈterəst fiːld/Ruộng bậc thangTerraced fields are stunning.
Weave(v) /wiːv/DệtThey weave cloth.
Bamboo(n) /bæmˈbuː/TreHouses are made of bamboo.
Festival(n) /ˈfestɪvl/Lễ hộiThey celebrate many festivals.
Gong(n) /ɡɒŋ/Cồng chiêngGongs are traditional instruments.
Heritage(n) /ˈherɪtɪdʒ/Di sảnCultural heritage is important.
Communal house(n) /kəˈmjuːnl haʊs/Nhà rôngThe communal house is central.
Worship(v) /ˈwɜːʃɪp/Thờ cúngThey worship ancestors.
Ancestor(n) /ˈænsestə(r)/Tổ tiênThey respect their ancestors.
Unique(adj) /juˈniːk/Độc đáoEach group is unique.
Diverse(adj) /daɪˈvɜːs/Đa dạngVietnam is diverse.

sections.heading: 2. Luyện tập từ vựng (Vocabulary Practice)
sections.content:
Major ethnic groups in Vietnam:

  • Kinh: majority (86%)
  • Tay, Thai, Muong, Khmer, Hmong, Nung, Dao: large minorities

Traditional features:

  • stilt house: nhà sàn
  • terraced field: ruộng bậc thang
  • communal house: nhà rông
  • traditional costume: trang phục truyền thống
  • gong: cồng chiêng

Activities:

  • weave cloth: dệt vải
  • make crafts: làm thủ công
  • worship ancestors: thờ cúng tổ tiên
  • celebrate festivals: tổ chức lễ hội

sections.heading: 3. Ngữ âm (Pronunciation)
sections.content:
Stress in words ending in -al and -ous

1. Words ending in -al (nhấn trước -al):

  • tra'ditional /trəˈdɪʃənl/
  • cul'tural /ˈkʌltʃərəl/
  • com'munal /kəˈmjuːnl/

2. Words ending in -ous (nhấn trước -ous):

  • 'famous /ˈfeɪməs/
  • 'various /ˈveəriəs/
  • re'ligious /rɪˈlɪdʒəs/

sections.heading: 4. Ngữ pháp (Grammar)
sections.content:
Yes/No Questions and Wh-questions

A. Yes/No Questions:

1. With 'to be':

  • Am/Is/Are + S...?
  • Ex: Is it a stilt house? - Yes, it is. / No, it isn't.
  • Ex: Are they ethnic minorities? - Yes, they are.

2. With ordinary verbs:

  • Do/Does + S + V...?
  • Ex: Do they live in stilt houses? - Yes, they do.
  • Ex: Does she wear traditional costume? - Yes, she does.

3. With modal verbs:

  • Can/Will/Should + S + V...?
  • Ex: Can you speak their language? - Yes, I can.

B. Wh-questions:

1. Question words:

  • What: Cái gì - What is this?
  • When: Khi nào - When is the festival?
  • Where: Ở đâu - Where do they live?
  • Who: Ai - Who are they?
  • Why: Tại sao - Why do they wear costumes?
  • How: Như thế nào - How do they make it?
  • How many/much: Bao nhiêu - How many groups are there?
  • Which: Cái nào - Which group is the largest?

2. Structure with 'to be':

  • Wh-word + is/are + S?
  • Ex: What is their traditional costume?
  • Ex: Where are the terraced fields?

3. Structure with ordinary verbs:

  • Wh-word + do/does + S + V?
  • Ex: Where do they live?
  • Ex: What does she wear?

4. When 'who/what' is the subject:

  • Who/What + V(s/es)?
  • Ex: Who lives here? (không dùng 'do/does')
  • Ex: What happens at the festival?

sections.heading: 5. Getting Started
sections.content:
Chủ đề: Ethnic groups of Viet Nam

Nội dung: Hội thoại về các dân tộc, văn hóa, phong tục

sections.heading: 6. A Closer Look 1
sections.content:
A. Vocabulary: Ethnic groups and their culture

B. Pronunciation: Stress in -al and -ous words

sections.heading: 8. Communication
sections.content:
Useful expressions:

  • What ethnic group is...?
  • Where do they live?
  • What do they wear?
  • How do they celebrate...?

sections.heading: 9. Skills 1 (Reading & Speaking)
sections.content:
Reading: About ethnic groups

Speaking: Discussing ethnic cultures

sections.heading: 10. Skills 2 (Listening & Writing)
sections.content:
Listening: About an ethnic group

Writing: About an ethnic group using questions

sections.heading: 12. Project
sections.content:
Đề tài: An ethnic group in Vietnam

Nhiệm vụ: Nghiên cứu, tạo poster, viết mô tả (100-120 từ)

problemTypes.name: Dạng 1: Yes/No Questions
problemTypes.method:
Phương pháp:

  • Is/Are + S...? (với 'to be')
  • Do/Does + S + V...? (với động từ thường)

problemTypes.name: Dạng 2: Wh-questions
problemTypes.method:
Phương pháp:

  • Chọn từ để hỏi phù hợp: What, When, Where, Who, Why, How
  • Wh-word + do/does + S + V?

problemTypes.name: Dạng 3: Who/What as subject
problemTypes.method:
Phương pháp:

  • Who/What + V(s/es)?
  • Không dùng do/does

examples.question: ______ lives here?
examples.explanation: Who là chủ ngữ → không dùng do/does

problemTypes.name: Dạng 4: How many/much
problemTypes.method:
Phương pháp:

  • How many + danh từ đếm được số nhiều
  • How much + danh từ không đếm được

exercises.question: ______ lives here?
exercises.explanation: Who là chủ ngữ → không dùng do/does
